subcodes.first_line: O my God! O Lord of the two Easts and the two Wests, Illuminator of the horizons with the resplendent light that shineth from the twin Dawning-Places [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی یا رب المشرقین و رب المغربین و منور الخافقین بالنور الساطع من المطلعین و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @presence of; reunion with God, @eulogies; reminiscences
